  "videoTitle": "Buying the Nice Chicken",
  "content": "Learn how to select the best chicken for your curry. \n- Look for fresh, plump chicken. \n- Check the color; it should be pale pink. \n- Ensure there’s no unpleasant odor. \n- Choose organic if possible for better flavor.",
  "videoWebUrl": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID"
}
